mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM coupon_issue ci LEFT JOIN coupon c ON ci.couponNo = c.couponNo

SELECT ci.issueNo AS issueNo, ci.couponNo AS couponNo, ci.memberUid AS memberUid, ci.status AS status, ci.createdAt AS createdAt, ci.updatedAt AS updatedAt, c.couponType AS couponType, c.sellerUid AS sellerUid, c.benefit AS benefit, c.name AS couponName, c.startDate AS startDate, c.expireDate AS expireDate, c.notice AS notice FROM coupon_issue ci LEFT JOIN coupon c ON ci.couponNo = c.couponNo
ORDER BY ci.issueNo DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT ci.issueNo, ci.couponNo, ci.memberUid, ci.status, ci.createdAt, ci.updatedAt, c.couponType, c.sellerUid, c.benefit, c.name AS couponName, c.startDate, c.expireDate, c.notice FROM coupon_issue ci LEFT JOIN coupon c ON ci.couponNo = c.couponNo WHERE ci.issueNo = #{issueNo}

SELECT ci.issueNo, ci.couponNo, ci.memberUid, ci.status, ci.createdAt, ci.updatedAt, c.name AS couponName FROM coupon_issue ci JOIN coupon c ON ci.couponNo = c.couponNo WHERE ci.memberUid = #{memberUid} AND ci.status = 0 ORDER BY ci.createdAt DESC
